nodes.context: Italian criminal organization involved in heroin trafficking and the Pizza Connection Trial.
US-based criminal organization involved in the Pizza Connection Trial.
American Mafia family; a faction allied with Sicilian faction in the trial.

edges.evidence_quote: The Pizza Connection Trial (in full, United States v. Badalamenti et al. ) was a criminal trial against the Sicilian Mafia and American Mafia
edges.context: Both organizations were defendants in the same trial, indicating cooperation in the drug ring.

edges.evidence_quote: Pistone testified that he was told that a Bonanno faction headed by Dominick Napolitano had formed an alliance with a Sicilian faction, which involved Salvatore Catalano.
edges.context: A Bonanno faction allied with a Sicilian faction for drug trafficking.
